title: Basque Comte Tart
description: A rich and creamy tart with a Basque-style crust, perfect for a special occasion. This gluten-free dessert is sure to satisfy any sweet tooth.
instructions: Roll out the galette dough and place it in a tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a bowl, mix together the grated Comte cheese, egg, and salt.
Pour the cheese mixture into the tart shell and smooth the top.
Dot the top of the tart with butter.
Bake the tart for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the tart from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Drizzle the indulgent caramel sauce over the top of the tart.
Serve the tart warm, topped with fluffy whipped cream.
